title: CAPAS Claim Gate: Evidence-Typed Claim Decisions for Scientific Computation Traces
description: CAPAS is a small evidence-typed claim gate for scientific-computation traces. It packages RO-Crate/PROV-style evidence and records physical evidence level, witness independence, evidence status, and claim decisions such as ACCEPT, REWRITE, REJECT, or HOLD. CAPAS does not claim to replace scientific verifiers, benchmarks, RO-Crate/PROV, or VVUQ methodology.
notes: Prototype research software. Current external validation status: pending.
